$comment: Recurring programming at Daddy O LBI seeded from the static HTML on /happenings (Wix Events widget data is locked behind API auth, so individual show titles aren't accessible). Pattern: live music every Thursday, Friday, Saturday 6-9pm at the bar, May 28 – Sep 26 2026. Replace this file when (a) the season changes or (b) a Wix adapter is built that pulls real titles + band names.

events.title: Live Music at Daddy O
events.address: 4401 Long Beach Blvd, Brant Beach, NJ 08008
events.description: Live music at the bar. Band TBA — see daddyolbi.com/happenings for the night's lineup.
